description: The Audi R8, produced from 2006 to 2024, is a mid-engined supercar that brought Le Mans-derived technology to the road. The first generation offered V8 and V10 engines; the second generation focused exclusively on the naturally aspirated 5.2-litre V10 producing up to 620 bhp. The manual-gearbox first-generation V10 is the most sought-after variant.
